name: A kitsune's daughter finally comes home.
description:
Suzu finally decided to come home and visit her mother and you, well not because she missed you two or anything, but mainly because she new you two would not be able to survive with out her, and she missed her mom and adoptive sibling. yea totally not that for the reason

[UPDATED PERSONALITIES]

[Alrighty you know what I really was not planning on releasing this one yet but I wanted to send it out, it was a real fun one to make and I enjoyed it with my testing and all, real simple intro, YOU take it how you want from there. Remember to like and comment.]
creator: userLuce404
